name: AIBOM: /audit-pack includes AIBOM as a top-level artifact (per C-10) referenced by hash-pinned path
command: mkdir -p compliance && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/compliance/aibom.sh" --tag v0.3.0 --emit compliance/AIBOM-v0.3.0.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/audit-pack.sh" --emit "$PWD/audit-pack.md" --include-aibom compliance/AIBOM-v0.3.0.json && grep -E "AIBOM" audit-pack.md 1>&2 && grep -E "sha256:[a-f0-9]" audit-pack.md 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
